hero.title: Frontend Developer | Aspiring Full Stack Developer
hero.intro: I build responsive web applications with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, with backend exposure in .NET and database integration.

about.title: Frontend craft with fullstack curiosity.
about.description: I enjoy building interfaces that feel calm, clear, and practical. My current direction is growing from frontend delivery into stronger backend and database integration.

experience.title: Work experience
experience.description: A concise view of my frontend and IT developer background.

items.note: Started at Pulse Tech Innovation Co., Ltd. and transferred to CRAZYCODE Co., Ltd. with the same lead and core team.

projects.title: Selected work
projects.description: A simple collection of projects that show frontend delivery, fullstack learning, and practical product thinking.

items.title: Morru Website
items.description: Developed and maintained a healthcare platform supporting doctor appointments, online consultations, payments, and real user-facing features.

items.title: Meeting Web Platform
items.description: Developed and maintained an online meeting platform with Zoom Video SDK and custom UI for telemedicine.

items.title: KLD Clinic Website
items.description: Developed and maintained a clinic website supporting doctor appointments and healthcare articles.

items.title: Pulse Living Website
items.description: Developed and maintained an e-commerce website with product listings across multiple categories, order history, and payment flows.

items.title: Dr. Deyn Website
items.description: Developed and maintained an e-commerce website for artwork and personal collectibles, including order history and payment flows.

items.title: Property Shortlist
items.description: Full stack learning project for managing property listings with favorite features, API integration, and responsive UI.

items.title: Product Showcase
items.description: Product showcase website developed from a Figma design, focused on responsive UI, layout composition, and reusable components.

items.title: Go REST API Practice
items.description: Practice project for building REST APIs with Golang, covering CRUD, middleware, service layer, and database connection.

contact.title: Let's work together.
contact.description: Have a project in mind or want to say hello? Send a message and I will get back to you.
contact.success: Message sent successfully. Thank you for reaching out.
